edit.emailUnverifyHint: Changing the email will unverify this account.
edit.selfRoleHint: You can't change your own role.
edit.selfDeactivateHint: You can't deactivate your own account.
edit.confirmDescription: Deactivate {{username}}? They will be cut off on their next request and can't sign in until reactivated.
